meaning: n.[圣经] 约书亚,约书亚书
examples: Joshua sends out spies to scout out the land.
There weren't even any walls in Jericho at the time of Joshua.
Moses holds out a rod during the battle in order that Israel prevails over her enemies, and Joshua will do the same with a javelin.
Think Sedona meets Stonehenge, about 20 miles north of Joshua Tree National Park.
Where did the original government prosecutors Joshua Goldberg and Alexander Willscher go to?
